creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Building your shar archive from 2017-07-01, I get the following error on 12.0-CURRENT amd64:

/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lRblas

My math/R was built with option ATLAS enabled instead of option RBLAS. Are there any plans for other BLAS options than the R-bundeld implementaion?
